sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_base58 (id UInt32, original_string String);
INSERT INTO test_base58 (id, original_string) VALUES (1, 'Hello World');
UPDATE test_base58 SET original_string = base58Encode(original_string) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, base58Encode(original_string) AS encoded_string FROM test_base58;
INSERT INTO test_base58 (id, original_string) VALUES (2, 'Clickhouse is great!');
